title: State Economy And Delayed Consequence
objective: Keep state minimal but meaningful, and ensure important decisions echo later rather than disappearing.
storyQuestions: Which variables are redundant, dead, or flavor-only?
Which choices write state that later scenes never read?
Where should a delayed consequence echo back into suspicion, access, or endings?
baseAcceptanceChecks: Every touched critical variable is read later in at least two places or is intentionally downgraded.
State changes in the touched span have identifiable later payoffs.
